abilities.Name: Good Fight, We Should Do It More Often
abilities.Effect: If a friendly Group's attack would cause an enemy Group to be completely removed from the table, the friendly Group may immediately turn up to 45 degrees.

abilities.Name: Maddening Communiqué
abilities.Effect: At the start of the Activation Phase, pick an opponent. That opponent's Abilities cost 1 additional AP to use until the end of the round.

abilities.Name: Forcing an Unfair Fight
abilities.Effect: At the start of the Activation Phase, pick a Dropsite you contest. Add a friendly Battalion to each Feature on that Dropsite. At the beginning of the Cleanup step of the End Phase, remove a friendly Battalion from each Feature on that Dropsite.

abilities.Name: Precision Strike
abilities.Effect: When you assign a Group's weapons to targets, pick one of the attacking Group's Weapon Systems. Improve the Lock of that Weapon System by 1 for this attack sequence.

abilities.Name: Prismatic Surprise
abilities.Effect: At the end of the Planning Phase, you may swap the attached Payloads of two Porter Ships with the same Porter value.

abilities.Name: Unsportsmanlike Behaviour
abilities.Effect: During this round's Cleanup step of the End Phase, all players retain any unspent AP from this round into the next round. In the next round, only players that have used this Ability this round can generate AP from Admirals in the Planning Phase.

Abilities.Name: Backpedal
Abilities.Effect: At the start of a friendly Group's activation, pick any friendly Group. You may move each Ship in that Group up to 3" directly backwards.

Abilities.Name: Gravitic Manoeuvring
Abilities.Effect: When a friendly Group is given a Max Thrust Order, it may turn as if it was on General Quarters.

Abilities.Name: Kinetic Deconstruction
Abilities.Effect: When a friendly Group makes an attack with any number of weapons with "Decon" in its name, those weapons change their Type to Kinetic until the end of its activation.

Special: This asset is automatically removed during the Cleanup step of the End Phase.
